clean_story: "Gender war isn’t men vs. women—it’s systems vs. humans. The myth? That patriarchy benefits all men. The truth? 95% of workplace deaths, 80% of suicides, and 70% of homeless are male (WHO, 2023)—while the top 1% of men hoard wealth like feudal lords. Women aren’t ‘winning’ either: 62 million girls are denied education globally (UNESCO), and female CEOs still earn 74¢ per $1 of their male peers (Pew). The real enemy? A rigged game where both genders bleed for scraps while elites laugh. Question: If you’re fighting the opposite sex instead of the system, who exactly are you protecting?" (599 chars)
